files.data:
# Calculus I reference course

This course is authored as portable MCF 1.0 source. It is intended as both a real learning resource and a conformance stress test.

## Coverage

- 6 chapters and 18 lessons
- notes, practice, and assessment activities
- all core question types
- essay completion requirements
- Markdown tables, block quotes, and code fences
- inline and display LaTeX
- local SVG images
- external YouTube provider reference

The external video in the limits chapter requires internet access. All other authored content and images are local.

The course declares `CC-BY-4.0` in `manifest.yaml`. Compile it from the repository root with:

```bash
npm run mcf -- validate examples/calculus-i
npm run mcf -- compile examples/calculus-i --output courses
```

It is also included in `npm run compile:examples`.

id: derivative-applications
title: 'Applications of Derivatives'
description: 'Optimization, curve analysis, and related rates'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-related-rates.mcf
  - lessons/02-optimization.mcf
  - lessons/03-curve-sketching.mcf

id: derivatives
title: 'Derivatives'
description: 'Rates of change and differentiation rules'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-derivative-definition.mcf
  - lessons/02-differentiation-rules.mcf
  - lessons/03-chain-rule-and-implicit.mcf

id: functions
title: 'Functions and Models'
description: 'Functions, representations, transformations, and inverse relationships'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-functions-and-models.mcf
  - lessons/02-transformations-and-composition.mcf
  - lessons/03-inverse-and-exponential-models.mcf

id: integral-applications
title: 'Applications and Synthesis'
description: 'Area, volume, average value, and cumulative review'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-area-between-curves.mcf
  - lessons/02-volumes.mcf
  - lessons/03-course-synthesis.mcf

id: integrals
title: 'Integrals'
description: 'Accumulation, antiderivatives, and the Fundamental Theorem'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-riemann-sums.mcf
  - lessons/02-fundamental-theorem.mcf
  - lessons/03-integration-techniques.mcf

id: limits
title: 'Limits and Continuity'
description: 'Local behavior, limit laws, and continuity'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-limit-intuition.mcf
  - lessons/02-limit-laws.mcf
  - lessons/03-continuity.mcf

mcf: '1.0'
id: calculus-i
title: 'Calculus I: Change and Accumulation'
language: en
description: 'A complete first-semester calculus course covering functions, limits, derivatives, integrals, and applications.'
authors:
  - 'MCF Project'
license: CC-BY-4.0
version: '1.0.0'
cover: assets/images/cover.svg
chapters:
  - source: chapters/functions
  - source: chapters/limits
  - source: chapters/derivatives
  - source: chapters/derivative-applications
  - source: chapters/integrals
  - source: chapters/integral-applications
